messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'A boy in a safety vest lays in the snow as another boy on skies stands near by while a man in a red jacket kneels in the snow by the boys.'.

1) Subject: boy | Relation: lays | Object: in a safety vest 
2) Subject: boy on skies | Relation: stands | Object: near by 
3) Subject: man in a red jacket | Relation: kneels | Object: in the snow 
4) Subject: man in a red jacket | Relation: kneels | Object: by the boys
